hooks.command: printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"STOP — WORKFLOW REQUIRED. Before writing any code you MUST: (1) Read .ai/rules/always.md (2) Read .ai/workflows/implement-issue.md and follow steps 1-4 including creating .ai/logs/planned-files.txt (3) Load matching on-* rules (on-frontend, on-backend, on-migration, on-testing) (4) Dispatch specialists (TODO: your specialist agent names from .claude/agents/) via Agent tool with isolation: worktree. Edit/Write tools are BLOCKED until planned-files.txt exists. Exception: trivial issues (<20 lines, pure text/config/rename) may be coded directly by the orchestrator — still create a one-line planned-files.txt first to pass the Edit/Write gate. Skipping pre-flight is a workflow violation."}}'

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && case "$FILE" in *.md|*settings.json|*settings.local.json|*.ai/logs/*) exit 0 ;; esac && if [ ! -f .ai/logs/planned-files.txt ]; then echo 'BLOCKED: .ai/logs/planned-files.txt missing. Run the pre-flight workflow (.ai/workflows/implement-issue.md steps 1-4) before writing code.'; exit 1; fi

CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty') && if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git add -A|git add --all|git add \.$|git add \. |git add \./$|git add \./ '; then echo 'BLOCKED: Stage explicit filenames instead of git add -A / git add . (see CLAUDE.md hard requirements)'; exit 1; fi

CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty') && if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'git commit'; then if ! [ -f .ai/scripts/verify.sh ]; then exit 0; fi; if ! [ -f .ai/logs/test-results.json ]; then echo 'Reminder: run bash .ai/scripts/verify.sh before committing.'; fi; fi
